texto: As a culture or a civilisation, we are a bit juvenile; it's like 'Oh, I have all this power, whoa, this is so cool, I can transform the earth and I can produce all this wealth. But we're blinded by our success in a naive way. There's more to life, actually, and I think the sustainability issue is also helpful in reminding us about that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tino Sehgal: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “As a culture or a civilisation, we are a bit juvenile; it's like 'Oh, I have all this power, whoa…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, vida, success pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e success.
